description: No valid Message-ID anywhere (missing/malformed on the message itself and on References/In-Reply-To) — threadId falls back to SHA-256(from_email + ':' + subject_lowercased_trimmed + ':' + date_utc_iso8601), lowercase hex. This fixture's expected threadId was independently verified with: printf '%s' 'unknown@example.com:quick question:2026-06-29T10:00:00Z' | shasum -a 256
